Sarah felt genuinely happy as she walked through the office doors for the first time. The large conference room impressed her with its floor-to-ceiling windows and modern furniture. Her supervisor gave her a quick tour of the department before introducing her to colleagues. The orientation session would begin promptly at nine o'clock in the main auditorium. Learning all the new software systems and procedures seemed quite difficult at first. She noticed a tiny plant on her desk with a welcoming note from her team. Her clever questions during the training session impressed both her manager and coworkers. The productive first day would end with a team lunch at the nearby restaurant.

Write about meeting an old friend.

I was so glad to see my childhood friend after ten years apart. She had grown into a confident woman with a large smile that lit up her entire face. We exchanged a quick hug before settling down at our favorite coffee shop. It felt natural to start reminiscing about our shared memories from elementary school. It was hard to believe how much time had passed since we last spoke. The small café buzzed with afternoon conversations as we caught up on life. My friend had become quite clever in her career as a software engineer. We promised to meet again soon before having to finish our wonderful reunion.

Write about a hiking adventure.

I was glad to finally escape the city and explore the mountain trails. The large granite peaks towered majestically above the forest canopy below. We made quick progress along the well-marked path through the pine trees. As storm clouds gathered overhead, we decided to begin our descent immediately. The rocky terrain became increasingly difficult to navigate in the fading light. A tiny stream provided fresh water for our nearly empty bottles. My clever hiking partner remembered to pack the emergency flashlight in her backpack. We reached the trailhead parking lot just as darkness began to end our adventure.
